name: golem-3dmcp
description: The most powerful MCP server for Rhinoceros 3D — 105 tools giving AI agents full read/write access to Rhino 8. Create geometry, run booleans, drive Grasshopper, capture viewports, and execute arbitrary Python scripts.

tools.name: get_document_info
tools.description: Get current Rhino document information including name, path, units, and object count.

tools.name: list_layers
tools.description: List all layers in the current Rhino document with their properties.

tools.name: create_layer
tools.description: Create a new layer with optional color, parent, and visibility settings.

tools.name: delete_layer
tools.description: Delete a layer and optionally its objects.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in the document with optional filtering by layer, type, and name.

tools.name: get_object_info
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific object by GUID.

tools.name: get_selected_objects
tools.description: Get all currently selected objects in Rhino.

tools.name: select_objects
tools.description: Select objects by their GUIDs.

tools.name: deselect_all
tools.description: Deselect all objects in the document.

tools.name: delete_objects
tools.description: Delete objects by their GUIDs.

tools.name: hide_objects
tools.description: Show or hide objects in the viewport.

tools.name: lock_objects
tools.description: Lock or unlock objects to prevent editing.

tools.name: set_object_layer
tools.description: Move objects to a different layer.

tools.name: set_object_name
tools.description: Set the name of an object.

tools.name: set_user_text
tools.description: Set a key-value user text attribute on an object.

tools.name: list_views
tools.description: List all viewport views in the document.

tools.name: set_active_view
tools.description: Set the active viewport by name.

tools.name: create_box
tools.description: Create a box with specified corner, width, depth, and height.

tools.name: create_sphere
tools.description: Create a sphere with center point and radius.

tools.name: create_cylinder
tools.description: Create a cylinder with base center, radius, and height.

tools.name: create_cone
tools.description: Create a cone with base center, radius, and height.

tools.name: create_torus
tools.description: Create a torus with center, major radius, and minor radius.

tools.name: create_line
tools.description: Create a line between two 3D points.

tools.name: create_arc
tools.description: Create an arc from center, radius, and angle range.

tools.name: create_circle
tools.description: Create a circle with center point and radius.

tools.name: create_polyline
tools.description: Create a polyline from a list of 3D points.

tools.name: create_nurbs_curve
tools.description: Create a NURBS curve from control points with degree and weights.

tools.name: create_point
tools.description: Create a point object at a 3D location.

tools.name: create_text
tools.description: Create text at a specified location with font and height options.

tools.name: boolean_union
tools.description: Perform boolean union on multiple solid objects.

tools.name: boolean_difference
tools.description: Subtract one or more solids from a base solid.

tools.name: boolean_intersection
tools.description: Compute the intersection of multiple solids.

tools.name: mirror_objects
tools.description: Mirror objects across a plane.

tools.name: array_objects_linear
tools.description: Create a linear array of objects with specified count and spacing.

tools.name: array_objects_polar
tools.description: Create a polar (radial) array of objects around a center point.

tools.name: group_objects
tools.description: Group objects together with an optional name.

tools.name: ungroup_objects
tools.description: Remove objects from their group.

tools.name: join_curves
tools.description: Join multiple curves into a single polycurve.

tools.name: explode_object
tools.description: Explode a compound object into its constituent parts.

tools.name: offset_curve
tools.description: Create an offset copy of a curve at a specified distance.

tools.name: fillet_curves
tools.description: Create a fillet between two curves with a specified radius.

tools.name: extrude_curve
tools.description: Extrude a curve along a direction vector to create a surface or solid.

tools.name: loft_curves
tools.description: Create a lofted surface through multiple cross-section curves.

tools.name: revolve_curve
tools.description: Revolve a curve around an axis to create a surface of revolution.

tools.name: sweep_1_rail
tools.description: Sweep cross-section curves along a single rail curve.

tools.name: sweep_2_rails
tools.description: Sweep cross-section curves along two rail curves.

tools.name: patch_surface
tools.description: Create a patch surface from boundary curves and interior points.

tools.name: planar_surface
tools.description: Create a planar surface from closed boundary curves.

tools.name: cap_planar_holes
tools.description: Cap planar openings in an open surface or polysurface.

tools.name: offset_surface
tools.description: Create an offset copy of a surface at a specified distance.

tools.name: mesh_from_surface
tools.description: Generate a mesh from a surface or polysurface with density settings.

tools.name: convert_to_nurbs
tools.description: Convert a mesh or SubD to a NURBS surface.

tools.name: rebuild_surface
tools.description: Rebuild a surface with new point count and degree.

tools.name: move_objects
tools.description: Move objects by a translation vector.

tools.name: copy_objects
tools.description: Copy objects with a translation offset.

tools.name: rotate_objects
tools.description: Rotate objects around a center point by an angle.

tools.name: scale_objects
tools.description: Scale objects uniformly from a center point.

tools.name: scale_objects_1d
tools.description: Scale objects in one direction from a center point.

tools.name: scale_objects_2d
tools.description: Scale objects in two directions from a center point.

tools.name: orient_objects
tools.description: Orient objects from one plane to another.

tools.name: align_objects
tools.description: Align objects along a specified axis.

tools.name: distribute_objects
tools.description: Distribute objects evenly along an axis.

tools.name: apply_transform
tools.description: Apply a 4x4 transformation matrix to objects.

tools.name: open_grasshopper_definition
tools.description: Open a Grasshopper definition file in Rhino.

tools.name: close_grasshopper_definition
tools.description: Close the current Grasshopper definition.

tools.name: run_grasshopper_definition
tools.description: Run a Grasshopper definition with input parameters and get outputs.

tools.name: get_grasshopper_outputs
tools.description: Get the output values from the current Grasshopper definition.

tools.name: set_grasshopper_input
tools.description: Set an input parameter value on a Grasshopper component.

tools.name: list_grasshopper_components
tools.description: List all components in the current Grasshopper definition.

tools.name: bake_grasshopper_objects
tools.description: Bake Grasshopper geometry into the Rhino document.

tools.name: capture_viewport
tools.description: Capture a viewport screenshot as a base64-encoded PNG image.

tools.name: set_camera
tools.description: Set the viewport camera position and target.

tools.name: zoom_extents
tools.description: Zoom the viewport to fit all objects.

tools.name: zoom_selected
tools.description: Zoom the viewport to fit selected objects.

tools.name: set_display_mode
tools.description: Set the viewport display mode (wireframe, shaded, rendered, etc.).

tools.name: set_background_color
tools.description: Set the viewport background color.

tools.name: add_named_view
tools.description: Save the current viewport as a named view.

tools.name: restore_named_view
tools.description: Restore a previously saved named view.

tools.name: get_document_path
tools.description: Get the file path of the current Rhino document.

tools.name: save_document
tools.description: Save the current Rhino document.

tools.name: save_document_as
tools.description: Save the current document to a new file path.

tools.name: new_document
tools.description: Create a new empty Rhino document.

tools.name: import_file
tools.description: Import geometry from an external file into the document.

tools.name: export_objects
tools.description: Export selected objects to a file (STL, OBJ, STEP, IGES, etc.).

tools.name: export_document
tools.description: Export the entire document to a file format.

tools.name: execute_python
tools.description: Execute arbitrary Python code with full RhinoCommon API access.

tools.name: execute_rhinoscript
tools.description: Execute RhinoScript/VBScript code in Rhino.

tools.name: evaluate_expression
tools.description: Evaluate a Python expression and return the result.

tools.name: run_rhino_command
tools.description: Execute a Rhino command-line command.

related_servers.name: blender-mcp
related_servers.description: MCP server for Blender 3D — complementary 3D modeling tool.

related_servers.name: filesystem
related_servers.description: MCP server for file system operations — useful for managing 3D model files.

related_servers.name: github
related_servers.description: MCP server for GitHub — manage repositories and collaborate on 3D projects.
